description_long: This is a small, blocky doll with a pixelated design, featuring a large, voluminous brown hairstyle adorned with a light blue bow or ornament on top. The doll wears a green dress with a white apron and a pink accent at the neckline, evoking a classic maid or storybook character look. Its face is simple, with two dark eyes and a small mouth, and the arms are outstretched to the sides, rendered in white to suggest sleeves. The legs are short and black, resembling shoes or boots, and the overall form is compact and stylized. The back of the doll shows the continuation of the large hair mass, while the sides reveal the three-dimensionality of the hair and the bow. The design is reminiscent of voxel art, with each feature constructed from cubic segments.
description: A pixelated doll with a large brown hairstyle, blue bow, green dress, white apron, and pink accent, styled in a classic maid or storybook fashion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, pink neckline, white apron, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, blocky hair and the blue bow on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full volume of the brown hair and the back of the green dress.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's depth and the blue bow.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic maid-inspired outfit with a green dress, white apron, and pink accent at the neckline, featuring blocky, pixel-art styling and no visible patterns.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs together, and head facing forward; posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with two dark eyes and a small, straight mouth; no visible eyebrows or emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: Large, voluminous brown hair styled in a high, rounded mass with a light blue bow or ornament on top, rendered in a blocky, pixelated fashion.
